mapper.select: select p.out_put_id as outPutId, p.ent_code as entCode, e.ent_name as entName, p.out_put_code as outPutCode, p.out_put_name as outPutName, p.mn_num as mnNum, e.we_com_msg as weComMsg, p.out_put_type as outPutType, p.out_put_status as outPutStatus, p.trans_rate as transRate, p.valid_rate as validRate, p.minute_data_interval as minuteDataInterval, p.per_alarm_id as perAlarmId, ua.user_name as perAlarmName, ua.phonenumber as perAlarmPhone, ua.email as perAlarmEmail, e.region from t_ent_out_put_info p left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = p.ent_code left join sys_user ua on ua.user_id = p.per_alarm_id

select i.out_put_id, e.ent_code, e.ent_name, i.out_put_code, i.out_put_name, i.out_put_type, i.out_put_status, i.longitude, i.latitude, i.clock_range, i.out_put_height, i.out_put_position, i.install_online, i.mn_num, i.trans_rate, i.valid_rate, i.real_data_interval, i.minute_data_interval, i.pollutant_code, i.remark, i.create_time, i.update_time, i.control_level, i.per_id, u.user_name as perName, u.phonenumber as perPhone, u.email as perEmail, i.per_alarm_id, ua.user_name as perAlarmName, ua.phonenumber as perAlarmPhone, ua.email as perAlarmEmail from t_ent_out_put_info i left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = i.ent_code left join sys_user u on u.user_id = i.per_id left join sys_user ua on ua.user_id = i.per_alarm_id where i.out_put_id = #{outPutId}
select out_put_id as outPutId, out_put_code as outPutCode from t_ent_out_put_info where ent_code = #{entCode}
select out_put_id as outPutId, out_put_code as outPutCode from t_ent_out_put_info where ent_code = (select ent_code from t_ent_out_put_info where out_put_id = #{outPutId} limit 1)
mapper.insert:
insert into t_ent_out_put_info
out_put_id, ent_code, out_put_code, out_put_name, out_put_type, out_put_status, longitude, latitude, clock_range, out_put_height, out_put_position, install_online, mn_num, trans_rate, valid_rate, real_data_interval, minute_data_interval, pollutant_code, control_level, per_id, per_alarm_id, remark, create_time,
#{outPutId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutCode}, #{outPutName}, #{outPutType}, #{outPutStatus}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{clockRange}, #{outPutHeight}, #{outPutPosition}, #{installOnline}, #{mnNum}, #{transRate}, #{validRate}, #{realDataInterval}, #{minuteDataInterval}, #{pollutantCode}, #{controlLevel}, #{perId}, #{perAlarmId}, #{remark}, #{createTime},
mapper.select:
select pollutant_code as pollutantCode, pollutant_name_cn as pollutantName from t_bas_pollutant_code
and pollutant_type = #{outPutType}
select count(*) from t_bas_user_put_info where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from t_bas_user_put_info where user_id = #{userId} and out_put_id = #{outPutId}
mapper.select:
select r.other_id as outPutId, r.facility_id as facilityId, f.facility_code as facilityCode, f.facility_name as facilityName from t_ent_poll_control_facility_relate r, t_ent_poll_control_facility f where f.facility_id = r.facility_id and r.other_type = #{otherType} and r.other_id in
#{outPutId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_ent_poll_control_facility_relate (facility_id, other_type, other_id) values
(#{facilityId}, #{otherType}, #{otherId})
mapper.delete: delete from t_ent_poll_control_facility_relate where other_id = #{otherId} and other_type = #{otherType}
mapper.select:
select out_put_id as outPutId, alarm_code as alarmCode, out_put_status as outPutStatus, is_enabled as isEnabled, data_type as dataType, data_dur as dataDur, data_cycle as dataCycle from t_ent_out_put_alarm
and out_put_id = #{outPutId}

select a.out_put_id as outPutId, a.alarm_code as alarmCode, a.out_put_status as outPutStatus, a.is_enabled as isEnabled, a.data_type as dataType, a.data_dur as dataDur, a.data_cycle as dataCycle from t_ent_out_put_alarm a left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = #{outPutId} where a.out_put_id = CONVERT(o.out_put_type, CHAR)
mapper.insert:
insert into t_ent_out_put_alarm (out_put_id, alarm_code, out_put_status, is_enabled, data_type, data_dur, data_cycle) values
(#{item.outPutId}, #{item.alarmCode}, #{item.outPutStatus}, #{item.isEnabled}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.dataDur}, #{item.dataCycle})
